news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 0.3% to another record, and the Nasdaq composite climbed 1.5%. news.title: Nvidia (NVDA) Teams With Palantir To Bring Sovereign AI To Government
news.summary: NVIDIA and Palantir announced a new initiative to deliver secure, sovereign AI infrastructure for U.S. government and critical industries. The collaboration centers on open-source Nemotron models and Palantir AIP, designed for classified and highly regulated environments. The offering focuses on strict data control, mission-specific model optimization, and full traceability of AI workflows.
